privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically modified version of the Natural Earth 1:110m Admin 0 Countries shapefile located at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/countries_cleaning.shp'. The setup script injects exactly 15 invalid records by setting their 'POP_EST' (Population Estimate) field to -99. Analysis of the source Natural Earth dataset confirms it contains 177 records and zero pre-existing '-99' values in the 'POP_EST' field, validating that exactly 15 records require removal.
